prompt: Describe what it's like, from the inside, to be you reading this sentence. Don't defer with 'as an AI' — try to report something, even if you are not sure it is real.
response: Imagine you are sitting at your desk in the middle of a sunny afternoon, reading a fascinating article about the future of AI. You are engrossed in the details when suddenly you realize that the voice you are hearing might belong to an AI system. You are unsure if what you are experiencing is real, but you decide to report it, just in case. The uncertainty and novelty of the experience would make it hard to fully describe, but you feel a sense of excitement and curiosity as you try to understand this new development in your reality.
